title: Conflict of interest; recusal of members
doc_html:
Rule 13.60. Conflict of interest; recusal of members

A member may recuse himself from all committee proceedings relating to any question when he believes he has a conflict of interest.

Rule 13.60. Conflict of interest; recusal of members
A member may recuse himself from all committee proceedings relating to any question when he believes he has a conflict of interest.
